scripts.dev: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron . --dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron-builder
scripts.pack: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron-builder --publish=never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis zip
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64 --ia32 --arm64
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64
scripts.dist:win:ia32: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis zip --ia32
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis zip --arm64
scripts.dist:all: npm run prepare:photopea && npm run build:vue && electron-builder -mwl
